Armor Bonus.description: Armor-like bonus to AC. Maxed against worn armor enhancement from Inventory (does not stack with higher armor enh).

AC Bonus.description: General bonus to AC. The selected Bonus Type (Sacred, Profane, Deflection, etc.) determines the category and display in the AC widget.

Bonus to All Saves.description: Bonus that applies to all three saving throws.

All Skills.description: Bonus that applies to all skill checks.

Blindsense.description: Grants blindsense out to Value feet (shown on the Stats page Senses widget).

Climb Speed.description: Bonus or base climb speed in feet.

Darkvision.description: Grants darkvision out to Value feet (shown on the Stats page Senses widget).

Initiative.description: Bonus to initiative checks (added to Dex mod + other bonuses like Improved Initiative).

Stat: Strength.description: Bonus to Strength score. Bonus Type chooses Enhancement vs Inherent (or other).

Fly Speed.description: Bonus or base fly speed in feet.

Shield Bonus.description: Shield bonus to AC. Maxed against worn shield enhancement.

Swim Speed.description: Bonus or base swim speed in feet.

Tremorsense.description: Grants tremorsense out to Value feet (shown on the Stats page Senses widget).
